name: Peach Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend flour, powdered sugar and margarine until combined.
2. Press the mixture into a well-greased 9x9-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients.
5. Pour the mixture over the baked crust.
6. Return to oven and bake an additional 35 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and cool.
8. Serve with ice cream or whipped topping.
